text.title: Kubernetes ResourceQuota Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Kubernetes ResourceQuota` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: size-quota
step.action: Compute compute + storage + object caps from SLA / budget.

step.name: scope-by-priority
step.action: If priority classes used, split quota with scopeSelector.

step.name: apply-and-watch
step.action: Apply; observe usage over 1 cycle; adjust as needed.
